name: item-image
visual_summary: The item-image component is a rectangular container that displays an item's main image, typically used within catalogs, inventory lists, or on product detail pages.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready card component with the following characteristics:

Name: item-image
Description: The item-image component is a rectangular container that displays an item's main image, typically used within catalogs, inventory lists, or on product detail pages.
Style: e.g. rounded, shadowed, responsive
Interactions: e.g. clickable, tappable
Tags: item, image, product, catalog, inventory

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
